title: DBInstance
description: Contains the details of an Amazon Neptune DB instance.

DBInstanceClass.description: The compute and memory capacity of the instance.

DBClusterIdentifier.description: The cluster this instance belongs to.

AvailabilityZone.description: The Availability Zone of the instance.

PreferredMaintenanceWindow.description: The weekly time range for system maintenance.

EngineVersion.description: The version of the database engine.

AutoMinorVersionUpgrade.description: Whether minor version upgrades are applied automatically.

PubliclyAccessible.description: Whether the instance is publicly accessible.

DBInstanceArn.description: The ARN of the DB instance.

PromotionTier.description: The failover priority for the instance.

StorageEncrypted.description: Whether the instance storage is encrypted.
